template_metadata.notes: sheet_row is 0-based row index in the INPUT SHEET data array. Rows from Form_IV, Form_V, Form_VI have sheet_row=null as they are derived output sheets, not direct input rows. CMA code prefixes: II_=Form II Operating Statement, III_=Form III Balance Sheet, IV_=Form IV Working Capital Comparison, V_=Form V MPBF, VI_=Form VI Funds Flow. is_subtotal=true marks aggregation/total rows. subtotal_feeds_into identifies the parent aggregation node for this row.
